title: EQ - Select a value, close the EQ tab, restore defaults - it is returned to Bass
scenario: EQ value resets to Bass instead of Flat after performing Restore Defaults in Device Settings
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Select an EQ value (e.g., Bass, Bright, or Custom EQ)
Close the Equalizer tab (tap back or close)
Navigate back to Audio Settings → Equalizer
expected: After Restore Defaults, the EQ value should be set to Flat (the default EQ setting).
